query:
DELETE FROM interacoes
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT i.id
    FROM interacoes i
    WHERE DATE(i.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM interacoes i2
        WHERE i2.leadId = i.leadId
          AND i2.corretorId = i.corretorId
          AND i2.tipo = i.tipo
          AND DATE(i2.createdAt) = DATE(i.createdAt)
          AND i2.id < i.id
          AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, i2.createdAt, i.createdAt) < 60
      )
  ) AS duplicates
);

          AND i2.corretorId = i.corretorId
          AND i2.tipo = i.tipo
          AND DATE(i2.createdAt) = DATE(i.createdAt)
          AND i2.id < i.id
